He presented himself to Zhuge Liang during the southern campaign against Meng Huo and was appointed a Van Leader. full_text:
Guan Suo 關索
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guan Suo (關索). Fictional son of Guan Yu. Greatly involved in Shu’s Southern Campaigns in the novel. Guan Suo is a fictional character. Guan Suo was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.

Guan Suo

BiographySanguo Yanyi
Guan Suo was the third son of Guan Yu. He was not able to compete in the war to avenge Guan Yu due to illness. He presented himself to Zhuge Liang during the southern campaign against Meng Huo and was appointed a Van Leader. Along with Wang Ping, he aided in luring Meng Huo to the first ambush in a string of ambushes for the first capture of Meng Huo. Also aided in taking prisoners during Meng Huo’s third capture.
